hero.title: Frequently asked questions from the source topics
hero.intro: Answers are based on the reference content themes and rewritten for clarity.

items.question: Why is socialisation important in daycare?
items.answer: The source describes daycare as supervised social interaction where dogs can play safely, build confidence, and maintain healthy activity routines.

items.question: Which dogs need grooming and how often?
items.answer: Frequency depends on coat type and condition. The source grooming content includes options from routine coat maintenance to full styling and hygiene support.

items.question: Do I need both flea and worm treatments?
items.answer: Reference blog content frames flea and worm control as separate concerns that may require different treatment schedules, so owners should follow veterinary advice.

items.question: Why choose hydrotherapy?
items.answer: The hydrotherapy pages describe it as a low-impact option that may support mobility, rehabilitation, and fitness where land exercise alone is not ideal.

items.question: Can maps be disabled for privacy?
items.answer: Yes. This site gates the map behind functional cookie consent and still provides phone, email, and address details for direct contact.
